[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101000000 2
1 000000001 1
2 000110100 3
3 000000010 1
4 111110100 6
5 010000011 3
6 000100001 2
7 001010010 3

01 10 010001000 2
12 21 010000001 2
23 32 111000001 4
34 43 000010011 3
45 54 000010010 2
56 65 001010000 2
67 76 000000100 1
70 07 000100100 2

02 20 010100000 2
13 31 010000011 3 match 5
24 42 000100001 2 match 6
35 53 001010010 3 match 7
46 64 000010100 2
57 75 000000000 a
60 06 000010100 2
71 17 000000001 1 match 1

03 30 010010000 2
14 41 000000011 2
25 52 001000000 1
36 63 101010000 3
47 74 000100101 3
50 05 000010000 1
61 16 000000000 a
72 27 000100001 2 match 6

04 40 000110100 3 match 2
15 51 000000010 1 match 3
26 62 101000000 2 match 0
37 73 000000001 1 match 1
